title: 第1周 第2天 — 合同总体结构
objective: 掌握英文商务合同的总体结构框架，识别并理解合同各组成部分的英文名称及其功能，为后续逐层深入学习奠定基础。

blocks.text: 英文商务合同的结构高度标准化。无论是股权收购协议、服务合同还是保密协议，其骨架基本一致。以下 12 个术语构成了合同结构的核心词汇。

rows: contract title; title of the agreement; title page
the preamble of this Agreement; preamble clause; as set forth in the preamble
n. 鉴于条款；背景叙述
the recitals hereto; recitals section; as described in the recitals
definitions and interpretation; as defined in Article 1; defined terms
n. 实质性条款；正文条款
the operative provisions of this Agreement; key operative provisions
boilerplate
n. 通用条款；标准条款
boilerplate clauses; boilerplate provisions; standard boilerplate language
schedules attached hereto; as set out in Schedule A; schedule of deliverables
termination clause; penalty clause; pursuant to Clause 5.2
general provisions; subject to the provisions of; key provisions
Article 3 of this Agreement; under this Article; article by article
amendment to the Agreement; first amendment; amendment and restatement
execution of this Agreement; execution copy; upon execution

blocks.html:
辨析：clause vs. provision vs. article
三者均可译为“条款”，但使用场景有别。Article 通常指合同的大章节编号（如 Article 1, Article 2），层级最高。Clause 指具体的条文，偏口语化，也常用于指某一特定条款（如 termination clause）。Provision 最为通用，既可指单条条款，也可泛指一组条款（如 general provisions），语域最正式。

items.text: This Share Purchase Agreement (“Agreement”) is entered into as of January 15, 2026.
items.translation: 本《股权收购协议》（以下简称“本协议”）于2026年1月15日签订。

items.text: The preamble identifies the parties to this Agreement and the date of execution.
items.translation: 序文载明本协议的当事人及签署日期。

items.text: The recitals set forth the background and purpose of the transaction contemplated herein.
items.translation: 鉴于条款阐述了本协议所述交易的背景和目的。

items.text: Unless otherwise defined herein, capitalized terms used in this Agreement shall have the meanings ascribed to them in Article 1 (Definitions).
items.translation: 除本协议另有定义外，本协议中使用的大写术语应具有第一条（定义）中赋予的含义。

items.text: The operative provisions of this Agreement shall become effective upon execution by both parties.
items.translation: 本协议的实质性条款自双方签署后生效。

items.text: Each article of this Agreement addresses a distinct aspect of the parties' rights and obligations.
items.translation: 本协议各条分别针对当事人权利义务的不同方面。

items.text: The Seller's obligations under Clause 4.2 are subject to the conditions set forth in Article 6.
items.translation: 卖方在第4.2条项下的义务须受第六条所列条件的约束。

items.text: Any amendment to this Agreement shall be in writing and duly executed by all parties hereto.
items.translation: 对本协议的任何修订均须以书面形式作出，并经全体当事人正式签署。

items.text: The boilerplate provisions, including severability and entire agreement clauses, are contained in Article 12.
items.translation: 通用条款，包括可分割性条款和完整协议条款，载于第十二条。

items.text: The schedules attached hereto shall form an integral part of this Agreement.
items.translation: 本协议所附附件构成本协议不可分割的组成部分。

items.text: The provisions of this Agreement shall survive the execution and delivery of the closing documents.
items.translation: 本协议之条款在交割文件签署交付后继续有效。

items.text: This Agreement has been executed in two counterparts, each of which shall be deemed an original.
items.translation: 本协议一式两份签署，每份均视为正本。

items.title: 长难句 1
items.sentence: Unless otherwise defined herein, capitalized terms used in this Agreement shall have the meanings ascribed to them in Article 1 (Definitions), and any reference to a “Clause” or “Article” shall be construed as a reference to a clause or article of this Agreement.
structure: 条件状语：Unless otherwise defined herein — 除非本协议另有定义
主句1：capitalized terms ... shall have the meanings ascribed to them in Article 1 — 大写术语具有第一条中的含义
并列主句2：any reference to a “Clause” or “Article” shall be construed as ... — 对“条款”或“条”的提及应解释为……
关键搭配：ascribed to（赋予）；construed as（解释为）
items.translation: 除本协议另有定义外，本协议中使用的大写术语应具有第一条（定义）中赋予其的含义，且对“条款”或“条”的任何引用均应被解释为对本协议中相应条款或条的引用。

items.title: 长难句 2
items.sentence: The Schedules and Exhibits attached hereto and referred to herein are hereby incorporated in and made a part of this Agreement with the same force and effect as if set forth in full in the body hereof.
structure: 主语：The Schedules and Exhibits — 附件和附录
后置定语1：attached hereto — 附于本协议的
后置定语2：and referred to herein — 并在本协议中提及的
谓语：are hereby incorporated in and made a part of this Agreement — 特此纳入本协议并成为其组成部分
状语：with the same force and effect as if set forth in full in the body hereof — 具有与在本协议正文中全文载入同等的效力
关键搭配：attached hereto（附于本协议）；incorporated in（纳入）；with the same force and effect（具有同等效力）
items.translation: 附于本协议并在本协议中提及的各附件和附录，特此纳入本协议并构成其组成部分，与在本协议正文中全文载入具有同等效力。

items.title: 长难句 3
items.sentence: No amendment, modification, or waiver of any provision of this Agreement shall be effective unless it is in writing and signed by the party against whom enforcement of such amendment, modification, or waiver is sought.
structure: 主语：No amendment, modification, or waiver of any provision of this Agreement — 对本协议任何条款的修订、修改或弃权
谓语：shall be effective — 不具有效力
条件状语：unless it is in writing and signed by the party — 除非以书面形式作出并经该方签署
定语从句：against whom enforcement of such amendment, modification, or waiver is sought — 被请求执行该修订、修改或弃权的一方
关键搭配：waiver of any provision（对条款的弃权）；enforcement is sought（请求执行）
items.translation: 对本协议任何条款的修订、修改或弃权，除非以书面形式作出并经被请求执行该修订、修改或弃权的一方签署，否则不具有效力。

groups.title: 练习A：术语匹配
groups.instruction: 选择各术语的正确中文释义。

questions.explanation: preamble 是合同开头段，载明当事人信息和签约日期。
recitals 是合同序言部分的背景叙述，通常以 WHEREAS 开头。
boilerplate 指合同尾部的标准化条款，如管辖法律、可分割性、完整协议等。
execution 在合同语境中主要指合同的正式签署，而非日常意义的‘执行’。
schedules 是附在合同正文之后的补充文件，包含具体细节、清单或技术参数等。

groups.title: 练习B：选词填空
groups.instruction: 根据语境选择最恰当的术语。

questions.prompt: The ______ of this Agreement describe the background of the transaction and the parties' intent.
questions.explanation: 合同的背景叙述部分称为 recitals。

questions.prompt: No ______ to this Agreement shall be valid unless executed in writing by both parties.
questions.explanation: 对合同的书面变更称为 amendment。

questions.prompt: The ______ set out the rights and obligations of the Buyer and the Seller under this Agreement.
questions.explanation: 合同的核心权利义务条款称为 operative provisions。

questions.prompt: All capitalized terms used herein shall have the meanings set forth in the ______ section.
questions.explanation: 合同中统一约定术语含义的部分称为 definitions。

questions.prompt: This Agreement shall become effective upon ______ by all parties.
questions.explanation: 合同的正式签署在法律英语中称为 execution。

groups.title: 练习C：长难句理解
groups.instruction: 阅读句子并选择最准确的理解。

questions.prompt: “The schedules attached hereto shall form an integral part of this Agreement.” 该句表达的含义是：
options: A. 附件仅供参考，不具有约束力
B. 附件需另行签署方可生效
C. 附件构成本协议不可分割的组成部分
D. 附件的效力高于合同正文
questions.explanation: ‘integral part’ 表示附件与正文具有同等法律地位，不可单独分割。

questions.prompt: “Any amendment to this Agreement shall be in writing and duly executed by all parties hereto.” 根据该条款，修订协议需满足：
options: B. 书面形式且经全体当事人签署
C. 一方书面通知即可
questions.explanation: 该句明确修订必须满足两个条件：书面形式 + 双方签署，缺一不可。

questions.prompt: “The Schedules ... are hereby incorporated in and made a part of this Agreement with the same force and effect as if set forth in full in the body hereof.” 此处 “with the same force and effect” 意味着：
options: A. 附件与正文具有同等法律效力
B. 附件需要额外授权
C. 附件效力低于正文
D. 附件可随时单方面修改
questions.explanation: ‘with the same force and effect as if set forth in full in the body hereof’ 明确附件效力等同正文。

questions.prompt: 下列哪项最准确地描述了 boilerplate clauses 的功能？
options: A. 规定合同当事人的核心交易义务
B. 叙述合同签订的背景和目的
C. 定义合同中使用的专有术语
D. 规定适用于各类合同的标准化通用条款
questions.explanation: boilerplate 特指合同末尾的标准化通用条款，如管辖法律、通知、可分割性等。

questions.prompt: 英文商务合同的标准结构排列顺序正确的是：
options: A. Title → Definitions → Preamble → Operative Provisions → Boilerplate
B. Title → Preamble → Recitals → Definitions → Operative Provisions → Boilerplate → Schedules
C. Recitals → Title → Definitions → Boilerplate → Schedules
D. Preamble → Title → Operative Provisions → Recitals → Definitions
questions.explanation: 合同标准结构依次为：标题 → 序文 → 鉴于条款 → 定义 → 实质性条款 → 通用条款 → 附件。

groups.title: 练习D：英译中翻译
groups.instruction: 将以下合同条款翻译为中文，完成后点击“提交 AI 批改”获取详细批改。

questions.source: The operative provisions of this Agreement shall become effective upon execution by both parties and shall remain in full force and effect until terminated in accordance with Article 8.
questions.reference: 本协议的实质性条款自双方签署后生效，并持续完全有效直至依据第八条终止。

rubric.note: operative provisions 特指合同核心权利义务条款
在合同语境中 execution = 签署
固定搭配，表示条款完整有效
合同中表示依照某条款规定

questions.source: In the event of any conflict between the provisions of the body of this Agreement and the schedules attached hereto, the provisions of the body of this Agreement shall prevail.
questions.reference: 如本协议正文条款与所附附件之间存在任何冲突，以本协议正文条款为准。

rubric.note: 合同中表示条件假设的固定表述
conflict 在合同中表示条款间的矛盾/不一致
body = 合同的主体/正文部分
prevail 在合同中表示效力优先

questions.source: Each article, clause, and provision of this Agreement is severable, and if any part is held to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.
questions.reference: 本协议的每一条、款及规定均可分割，若任何部分被认定为无效或不可执行，其余条款应继续完全有效。

rubric.note: severability 是合同通用条款核心概念
held = 裁定/认定（法律术语）
unenforceable = 法律上无法强制履行
remaining provisions 表示被保留有效的条款

groups.title: 翻译练习：英译中
groups.instruction: 将以下合同条款翻译为中文，完成后点击“提交 AI 批改”获取详细批改。

questions.source: This Agreement is entered into as of March 1, 2026, by and between ABC Corporation, a corporation organized and existing under the laws of the State of Delaware (hereinafter referred to as the 'Buyer'), and XYZ Trading Company, a corporation organized and existing under the laws of the People's Republic of China (hereinafter referred to as the 'Seller').
questions.reference: 本协议由特拉华州根据法律组织设立的ABC公司（以下简称“买方”）与中华人民共和国根据法律组织设立的XYZ贸易公司（以下简称“卖方”）于2026年3月1日订立。

rubric.note: entered into = 订立/缔结，as of 表示时间起点
by and between 是合同序文的固定表述，引出当事人

rubric.en: corporation organized and existing under the laws
rubric.ideal: 根据法律组织设立的公司
rubric.note: 该短语描述公司的法律地位与注册管辖区
hereinafter = 下文；referred to as = 称为，合同中用于首次定义当事人简称

questions.source: The preamble of this Agreement identifies the parties and sets forth the date of execution. All capitalized terms used herein shall have the meanings ascribed to them in Article 1, unless otherwise defined herein.
questions.reference: 本协议的序文载明当事人及签署日期。本协议中使用的所有大写术语应具有第一条中赋予的含义，除非本协议另有定义。

rubric.note: preamble 特指合同开头部分，含当事人、日期等基本信息
identify 在合同中表示正式规定或确定
ascribe to = 归属于/赋予，用于定义术语含义
否则条款的完整表述，用于术语定义

groups.title: 翻译练习：中译英
groups.instruction: 将以下中文条款翻译为英文合同用语，完成后点击“提交 AI 批改”获取详细批改。

questions.source: 本协议由下述双方根据各自的法律权限于2026年3月1日订立。以下各方统称为“当事人”。
questions.reference: This Agreement is entered into as of March 1, 2026, by and between the parties hereinafter set forth, each acting within its lawful authority. The parties hereto are collectively referred to as the 'Parties'.

accept: in accordance with their legal capacity
rubric.note: lawful authority 表示法律授权或法律能力
hereinafter set forth 是合同中的固定表述
collectively = 统称；referred to as = 称为
Parties (大写) 是合同中对签署方的正式称呼

sections.heading: 6. 今日小结
points: 合同七段式结构：Title → Preamble → Recitals → Definitions → Operative Provisions → Boilerplate → Schedules，这是英文商务合同的标准骨架。
三个“条款”辨析：article（大章节编号）＞ clause（具体条文）≈ provision（最通用的正式用语）。
amendment 与 execution：amendment 指对已签合同的修订变更；execution 在合同语境中特指正式签署，而非日常语义的“执行”。
boilerplate 不等于不重要：虽是“标准条款”，但管辖法律、争议解决、可分割性等条款直接影响合同的可执行性，实务中须逐条审查。
schedules 的法律地位：附件经“incorporated herein”条款纳入后，与合同正文具有同等效力。
